case_title: TONG, MARGARET vs. DAVE T. HALL SUED AS DAVID T. HALL et al

HALL DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          AUG-06-1996 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-07-1996 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       JUL-17-1996

REFUND/REIMBURSEMENT OF $78.00 FOR TRANSACTION 4501P1150000 (JURY FEES), PAYABLE TO S.F.SUPERIOR COURT, WARRANT #00018519, DATED JUN-06-1997

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DAVE T. HALL SUED AS DAVID T. HALL PLTF TO RECOVER $ 0.00, BUT IS AWARDED COSTS THROUGH COST BILL.
RECORD ON APPEAL PREPARED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TAKE NOTHING FROM DEFENDANT DAVE T. HALL SUED AS DAVID T. HALL PLAINTIFF SHALL TAKE NOTHING BY HER COMPLAINT. THE DEFENDANT IS THE PREVAILING PARTY, BUT THE PARTIES HAVE STIPULATED, AND THE COURT ORDERS, THAT EACH PARTY SHALL BEAR HIS OR HER OWN COSTS.

PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS, COMPLAINT, CASE QUEST.-COMPLETED NOTICE TO PLTF. FILED BY PLAINTIFF TONG, MARGARET SERVED JUL-09-1996, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT DAVE T. HALL SUED AS DAVID T. HALL

JUDGE DESMOND, P.DOWLING/CSR, K.LEE/CLERK 09:40AM COURT RECONVENES FOR CONTINUED JURY TRIAL. ALAN YEE FOR THE PLAINTIFF AND W. PAUL FOSTER FOR THE DEFT. ALL JURORS ARE PRESENT. JURY INSTRUCTION AND DELIBERATIONS. JURY RETURNS TO COURT WITH A VERDICT THAT THE DEFT WAS NEGLIGENT, BUT SUCH NEGLIGENCE WAS NOT A CAUSE OF INJURY TO THE PLTF. JURORS ARE POLLED AND ADMONISHMENT LIFTED. BOTH COUNSEL STIPULATE THAT DEPOSITIONS AND EVIDENCE MAY BE RETURNED. COURT IS ADJOURNED.
